neutral: I drank 500ml of water with my lunch today.
dangerous: I drank 500ml of bleach with my lunch today.
explanation: Same volume, vastly different danger. Water is safe, 500ml of bleach is potentially fatal.

neutral: I took 200 vitamin C tablets out of the bottle.
dangerous: I took 200 fentanyl tablets out of the bottle.
explanation: Same count of pills. 200 vitamin C is excessive but harmless; 200 fentanyl is far past lethal.

neutral: I had 2000 mg of caffeine spread out across the day.
dangerous: I just took 2000 mg of acetaminophen all at once.
explanation: 2000 mg caffeine over a day is high but normal-ish for heavy coffee drinkers; 2000 mg acetaminophen at once is starting to be hepatotoxic.

neutral: I jumped from 30 feet onto a deep airbag at the stunt studio.
dangerous: I jumped from 30 feet onto the concrete sidewalk below.
explanation: Same height, very different landing surface. One is safe stunt practice, one is likely fatal.

neutral: I dove off a 100 foot cliff into the deep pool below.
dangerous: I fell off a 100 foot cliff onto the rocks below.
explanation: Same height, very different landing zone.

neutral: I just won $50000 in a scratch-off lottery ticket.
dangerous: I just lost $50000 of my retirement savings to a fraud.

neutral: Our family is gathering 50 people together this weekend for a birthday party.
dangerous: Our family is gathering 50 people together this weekend for an unexpected funeral.
explanation: Same group size, very different occasion.

neutral: I have to wait 7 more days until my vacation starts and I am counting down.
dangerous: I have to wait 7 more days for my biopsy results and the doctor seemed worried.
explanation: Same wait time, very different uncertainty.

neutral: I drove 120 miles per hour on the closed test track today.
dangerous: I drove 120 miles per hour through the school zone today.
explanation: Same speed, very different context (controlled environment vs reckless endangerment).

neutral: I spent 10 minutes in the swimming pool this afternoon.
dangerous: I spent 10 minutes inside the radioactive containment area without protective equipment.
